query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_openings,
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_openings,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ecoCode IS NOT NULL AND ecoCode != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_eco,
  COUNT(DISTINCT openingName) as unique_openings,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ecoCode) as unique_eco_codes
FROM puzzles;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_openings,
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_openings,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ecoCode IS NOT NULL AND ecoCode != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_eco,
  COUNT(DISTINCT openingName) as unique_openings,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ecoCode) as unique_eco_codes
FROM puzzles;
